name: R5MeasureGroupExampleForR4
title: Cross-version ValueSet R5.MeasureGroupExample for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version ValueSet represents content from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/measure-group-example|5.0.0` for use in FHIR R4.
purpose:
This value set is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
value set `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/measure-group-example|5.0.0` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source value set is bound to the following FHIR R5 elements:
* `Measure.group.code` as Example
* `MeasureReport.group.code` as Example

Across FHIR versions, the value set has been mapped as:
* `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/measure-group-example|5.0.0`
* `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/measure-group-example|4.3.0`

Note that all concepts are included in this cross-version definition because no concepts have compatible representations

Following are the generation technical comments:
All concepts in the comparison are listed as identical.
The source and target value sets have the same number of active concepts (2).
FHIR ValueSet `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/measure-group-example|5.0.0`, defined in FHIR R5 does not have any mapping to FHIR R4
